## Description

A clear description of the feature or content you'd like to see.

## Use Case

Explain why this would be useful and what problem it solves.

## Proposed Content

If you have specific ideas about what should be included, list them here.

## References

Link to any relevant documentation, benchmarks (CIS, NIST, etc.), or vendor guidelines.
